scripts.dev: npm run start:keycloak && concurrently "npm run dev:signaling" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.start:keycloak: docker start keycloak || echo 'Keycloak already running'
scripts.dev:desktop: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && wait-on http://localhost:8180 && npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../signaling-server && npm install
